summary: Get pending token airdrops received by an account
description: Returns pending token airdrops that have been received by an account.

parameters.name: idOrAliasOrEvmAddress
parameters.description: Account alias or account id or evm address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed

parameters.name: sender.id
parameters.description: The ID of the sender to return information for

parameters.name: serialnumber
parameters.description: The nft serial number (64 bit type). Requires a tokenId value also be populated.

parameters.name: token.id
parameters.description: The ID of the token to return information for
